sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 98

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 98:1
items.html:
(to the question) Rucha deShadi beGava [the spirit he casts into her]
When ZA and Nukva rise as MAN to the upper AVI — for then they couple there in the palace of AVI, the first time after the Nesira — he then gives her a Rucha [spirit], which is the discernment of the essence of the Gevurot of the Nukva, that is, her discernment of GAR, and it completes her Nefesh, and she is completed in her AB, SAG, MA, and BON. And this is called the Rucha that her husband casts into her in the first coming. And this first coming is a face-to-face Zivug of ZON. However, with respect to their own discernment, this first coming is discerned as a back-to-back Zivug, since they serve in the Kelim of AVI — that is, they are then included in the Zivug of AVI themselves, and they themselves are not called by name, being included in AVI in the secret of MAN. Therefore this Zivug is in truth reckoned in the name of AVI; but since AVI do not couple upon discernments of MAN of their own, but upon the MAN of ZON, it is discerned as a face-to-face Zivug of ZON, for the Zivug is made upon their MAN, and not upon MAN of AVI. Understand this well. (Item 105)
